UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EPISCOPAL COMMUNITY SERVICES OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POMEROY, GEOFFREY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 589 POST STREET, UNIT #519 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 79048697)
